data.title: American Water Marks Drinking Water Week with National Focus on Safe, Reliable Water
data.description: In Camden, New Jersey, on May 1, 2026, American Water, listed on the NYSE as AWK, the leading regulated water and wastewater utility firm in the United States, emphasizes Drinking Water Week from May 3 to 9, 2026. The company remains committed to providing secure, pure, dependable, and cost-effective water services.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Kiely Family of Companies/
data.description: Kiely Family of Companies has officially acquired M. O'Herron Company, as mentioned in a news release issued on May 1, 2026. This update comes directly from a company representative who clarified the change in the headline from "Capitalized" to "Acquired". The transaction signifies a significant move in the industry and underscores Kiely Family of Companies' growth strategy. Further details on the acquisition and its impact will be disclosed in the complete announcement.

data.title: Record 182 CCM Originators Named to Scotsman Guide's Top Women List
data.description: In Cleveland on May 1, 2026, CrossCountry Mortgage (CCM) was recognized as the top retail mortgage lender in the country for the third year in a row. They have achieved this title with a noteworthy total of 182 loan officers being named to the prestigious 2026 Scotsman Guide Top Women Originators list. This is a new record for the company, showcasing their commitment to excellence and highlighting the exceptional talent within their workforce.

data.title: DOGE reaches 2-month high; Dogecoin Mining Firm to go public via merger. Nasdaq-listed company Shuttle shifts to crypto mining.
data.description: A well-known pharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq has shifted its focus to crypto mining, specifically Dogecoin mining. This marks the company’s first significant move into the world of institutional mining.

data.title: Entwistle Co. acquires The Hales Group in its latest business move. #acquisition #business #Entwistle #Hales
data.description: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in five years. The economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, surpassing expectations. This significant growth in job opportunities has led to an increase in consumer spending and confidence. The stock market also responded positively to this news, with major indexes reaching all-time highs. Experts attribute this success to various factors, including strong consumer demand, increased business investment, and government policies aimed at boosting job creation. However, concerns remain about inflation and the potential impact of rising wages on businesses. Overall, the current economic outlook appears optimistic, with the potential for further growth and prosperity in the coming months.

data.title: HINGE Early Education Advisors Honored With Two American Business Awards®
data.description: Distinguished for their outstanding achievements and progress in the field, top U.S. childcare transaction advisors have been acknowledged for their excellence in the industry. Among over 3,600 nominations, HINGE Early Education Advisors have emerged as the foremost experts in the nation when it comes to expanding and offloading childcare enterprises. This recognition signifies their prominence and leadership in the sector, showcasing their expertise and success in this competitive market.

data.title: Chemical Reduction Solutions LLC Expands Partnership with Simoniz USA Inc. to Exclusively Commercialize Nanobubble Technology in the Car Wash Industry
data.description: NASHOTAH, Wisconsin - Chemical Reduction Solutions LLC, a company specializing in hydrodynamic cavitation-based nanobubble technology, has revealed an enhanced collaboration with Simoniz USA Inc. Now, Simoniz® will have sole rights to market CRS's nanobubble tech in the car and truck wash sector. This exclusive agreement grants Simoniz® the privilege to provide CRS's nanobubble technology to professional car wash operators through the Simoniz® Nanobubblizer® line. This move is expected to significantly expand the availability of this innovative technology in the industry.

data.title: Altria to Host Webcast of 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: Altria, a major corporation based in Richmond, Virginia, has announced that they will be holding a webcast for their 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. This event is significant for the company as it provides an opportunity for shareholders to engage with the leadership team and learn more about the company's performance and future plans. The webcast is an accessible platform that allows shareholders from around the world to participate in the meeting remotely. This demonstrates a commitment to transparency and communication with investors. This announcement reflects the company's dedication to shareholder engagement and keeping stakeholders informed about important developments.
SPOT GOLD TURNS POSITIVE, LAST UP 0.4% AT $4,638.14

data.title: Meta Platforms Outlook Following Earnings Report
data.description: Shares of Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) experienced a decline after the latest earnings report, indicating a disparity between the current revenue figures and potential worries about future expenses. The company reported quarterly revenue of approximately $56 billion and earnings per share of $10.44, surpassing the expected $6.67. Despite the strong results, the stock plummeted by over 8% from the previous day's closing price during Thursday's trading. Investors redirected their attention to Meta's upcoming expenditure plans, causing the sell-off. Meta intends to increase spending in 2026 to a range of $125 billion to $145 billion, notably for expanding its artificial intelligence infrastructure, compared to the prior estimate of $115 billion. This higher projected spending includes investments in data-related ventures.

data.title: KAIJU NO. 8 THE GAME: Main Story Chapter 11 "Wanderfalke" Now Live! Zoee Wanderfalke, CLOZER's Strongest But Uncontrollable Combatant, Debuts Alongside 1,500 Dimensional Crystal Rewards in New Chapter Event!
data.description: Today, on May 1, 2026, KAIJU NO. 8 THE GAME, a collaboration between Akatsuki Games, TOHO, and Production I.G, released Main Story Chapter 11 titled "Wanderfalke." This update features the introduction of CLOZER's latest unit, ★5 [The Weapon Unsealed] Zoee Wanderfalke, described as the most potent but unpredictable unit yet. The game continues to gain popularity with this new addition to its roster of characters.

data.title: 2026 LEXUS ES 350h HYBRID JOINS BATTERY-ELECTRIC ES 350e, ES 500e IN EIGHTH-GENERATION ES LINEUP
data.description: In 2026, the ES 350h will feature the latest Sixth-Generation Hybrid System along with the option for All-Wheel Drive (AWD) on the Multi-Pathway Platform. The design of both the interior and exterior will be shared with the ES battery-electric models. The ES 350h will come in Premium and Premium+ trims. For the front-wheel-drive model, the EPA estimates a combined fuel efficiency of 46 MPG.

data.title: Lightedge Expands Kansas City Footprint with Acquisition of 3MW Tier III Data Center
data.description: Lightedge has recently solidified its dedication to the Kansas City market by acquiring a fully pre-leased facility with a 3-megawatt capacity. This latest move signifies the company's expansion in the region, emphasizing its commitment to offering secure hybrid cloud and colocation solutions. The facility has also been secured through a Right of First Refusal (ROFR) agreement, underlining Lightedge's strategic positioning in the market.
